column1: Read my lips: I ----- let you down. (не подведу)
Two weeks ago her plans ----- not clear.
They ----- get a shock from his behaviour tomorrow.
----- you tell me in confidence next week? (расскажешь)
----- nervous when you travel by plane? (Ты всегда нервничаешь)
We ----- to avoid the rush hour traffic, so we left early.
